## Meeting Purpose

[Coordinate and align multiple go-to-market teams on Anything's aggressive growth strategy for the next 6 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Anything aims to reach $40M ARR by December, driven by investor demo day opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Focus on positioning Anything as the tool for entrepreneurs to build revenue-generating apps](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Prioritizing rapid scaling of multiple channels, especially TikTok/IG, paid ads, and X (Twitter)](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
  - Centralizing customer success stories and narratives in \#story Slack channel for cross-channel use

## Topics

### Company Context and Goals

  - [Anything launched August 7th, growing from 0 to $3M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Closed $11M Series A in mid-September](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Aiming for $40M ARR by December 4th (HFZero demo day)](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Cash no longer a constraint; focus on rapid, efficient growth](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Opportunity to potentially raise large Series B if execution is strong](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Core Product and ICP

  - [Anything: AI-powered tool for building full-stack, mobile, and web apps without coding](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Key differentiators: reliability, best mobile app builder, all-in-one solution, polished designs](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Primary ICP: Non-technical, tech-adjacent internet entrepreneurs aiming to make money with apps](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [Secondary ICPs include freelancers, agencies, and enterprise innovation teams](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

### Key Product Features and Updates

  - [Anything Max ($200/mo): Autonomous software engineer for QA and bug fixing](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Upcoming iOS app launch (pending Apple approval)](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [RevenueCat integration for mobile app monetization](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Potential partnerships with Wix and other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

1.  TikTok/Instagram:
    
      - [Multiple teams working on UGC and influencer campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
      - [Seen as fastest potential scaling channel](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)

2.  Paid Ads:
    
      - [Google Ads: Claire and Katie leading](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)

3.  X (Twitter):

6.  SEO and Content:

7.  PR and Brand:

      - [Zaria leading brand redesign](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2406.0)

### Content and Narrative Focus

  - [Positioning Anything as the tool for entrepreneurs to make money with apps](https://fathom.video/share/Z5d7eDTd8r4D5ECp5HS2zGcR7EnWd9LZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
